macro_events.event_summary: Businesses attempting to claim refunds on previously-paid tariffs are encountering bureaucratic and procedural obstacles, delaying cash recovery.
primary_drivers: Delayed working capital recovery for tariff-paying importers
Administrative friction in CBP refund processing
Uncertainty around timing/magnitude of cash refunds already booked as receivables

losers.rationale: Five Below sources heavily from China; had been expected to recover tariff payments as refunds. Delays extend working capital drag on a low-margin discount retailer.
Best Buy's consumer electronics imports from China made it a large tariff payer; delayed refund processing pushes back cash flow recovery modeled into prior guidance.

headlines: Businesses trying to claim tariff refunds are already running into problems
